# Uploading the dataset to the EBV Data Portal {#sec-uploading}

*Learning objectives: submit a dataset through the portal UI and understand its review lifecycle.*

## Account & login

<!-- TODO: register at members.geobon.org, sign in -->

## Filling in the metadata form

<!-- TODO: general info / EBV attributes / entities tabs, mirroring dataset 30's page structure -->

## Uploading the netCDF and preview image

<!-- TODO -->

## Draft, submit for review, and versioning

<!-- TODO: portal status states observed: Draft -> Submit for review -> published; dataset 30 shows "Initial Version", 1 version available -->

## After publication: DOI and citation

<!-- TODO -->

**Checkpoint:** you've completed a real (or walked-through) submission using dataset 30 as reference.
